title: 理子との絆・過ちは繰り返さない

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer
<username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I figured you would be here as you weren't in your
room.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Have you made your first shrine visit for the new
year? If not, would you like to join me?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know it's a little late for a first visit, but it's far
better than not going at all.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's a trainer's job to pray for the safety of their
racers.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I must do everything I can to avoid having regrets
later.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Like when you wish you'd done something
differently or that something had turned out
another way.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I want to prevent any regrettable things from
happening, as much as possible—both for the
sake of my racers and for myself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: It's a hard lesson I learned from my past.
choice_data_list: You must have learned something important.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but there is no end to learning. We must
always strive to improve for our students.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
To ensure that everyone who wishes to race can
strive toward the future they desire...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I won't make the same mistakes again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see a strong resolve in her gaze as she looks
high into the sky above.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: And that's why I must thank you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Because I was able to learn so much from the
honest approach you take with your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Although I do think you venture out too far at
times...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow Tracen trainer, I'll be sure to caution
you whenever you do go overboard, all right?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Well, here's to a—

text_block_list.name: Man with Headband
text_block_list.text: Heeey, you two! Care to pound some mochi?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Us?

text_block_list.name: Man with Headband
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you two! C'mon, you can eat what you
make, and nothin' beats freshly made mochi!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: B-but I... well...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Very well. I suppose it's not often we get an opportunity like this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder if I can even lift the mallet.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hrgh! Urk! Hnnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help her as she shakily wields the mallet, and we
have fun making some mochi together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that our friendship will only
continue to grow from here.
